description: A Prometheus metric dashboard for go-ethereum

targets.expr: max(chain_account_commits{chain="$chain", instance=~"$instance", quantile="$quantile"} or chain_storage_commits{chain="$chain", instance=~"$instance", quantile="$quantile"})
max(chain_account_commits{chain="$chain", instance=~"$instance", quantile="$quantile"} or chain_storage_commits{chain="$chain", instance=~"$instance", quantile="$quantile"})

panels.description: Based on the state account read count
panels.title: Account Read%

panels.description: Based on the state storage read count
panels.title: Storage Read%

targets.expr:
sum(rate(geth_rpc_requests_success{quantile='$quantile', instance="$instance"}[5m])) by (chain, instance, method) 
/ 
sum(rate(geth_rpc_requests_success_count{instance="$instance"}[5m])) by (chain, instance, method) /1e6 
< 1e200

sum(rate(geth_rpc_requests_failure{quantile='$quantile', instance="$instance"}[5m])) by (chain, instance, method) / sum(rate(geth_rpc_requests_failure_count{instance="$instance"}[5m])) by (chain, instance, method) /1e6

panels.description:
# eth protocol

- `0x00` = StatusMsg
- `0x01` = NewBlockHashesMsg
- `0x02` = TransactionsMsg
- `0x03` = GetBlockHeadersMsg
- `0x04` = BlockHeadersMsg
- `0x05` = GetBlockBodiesMsg
- `0x06` = BlockBodiesMsg
- `0x07` = NewBlockMsg
- `0x08` = NewPooledTransactionHashesMsg
- `0x09` = GetPooledTransactionsMsg
- `0x0a` = PooledTransactionsMsg
- `0x0d` = GetNodeDataMsg
- `0x0e` = NodeDataMsg
- `0x0f` = GetReceiptsMsg
- `0x10` = ReceiptsMsg

# snap protocol

- `0x00` = GetAccountRangeMsg
- `0x01` = AccountRangeMsg
- `0x02` = GetStorageRangesMsg
- `0x03` = StorageRangesMsg
- `0x04` = GetByteCodesMsg
- `0x05` = ByteCodesMsg
- `0x06` = GetTrieNodesMsg
- `0x07` = TrieNodesMsg
panels.title: P2P Handles
